metrics.label: Balanced OTS
metrics.description: Operational triage score balanced across FP, Inc, and TP classes.

metrics.label: Critical Miss Rate %
metrics.description: Share of true positives classified as false positive.

metrics.label: False Review Load %
metrics.description: Share of false positives still sent to review as Inc or TP.

metrics.label: Threat Capture Rate %
metrics.description: Share of true positives still sent to review as Inc or TP.

metrics.label: False Escalation Rate %
metrics.description: Share of false positives escalated all the way to TP.

metrics.label: OTS %
metrics.description: Operational triage score across the full benchmark set.

metrics.label: OTS Macro
metrics.description: Operational triage score macro-averaged across classes.

metrics.label: Anomaly Capture %
metrics.description: Share of inconclusive or suspicious findings still surfaced for review.

metrics.label: Anomaly Suppression %
metrics.description: Share of anomaly-like findings suppressed out of review.

metrics.label: Seconds / Event
metrics.description: Average wall-clock latency per finding reviewed.

metrics.label: Exact Match Rate %
metrics.description: Share of all findings classified exactly like the ground truth.

metrics.label: Minor Miss Rate %
metrics.description: Share of all findings where the model was one classification step away.

metrics.label: Hard Error Rate %
metrics.description: Combined TP↔FP hard error share across all findings.

metrics.label: LLM Error Rate %
metrics.description: Share of all findings without a usable model response.

metrics.label: Total Tokens
metrics.description: Total tokens consumed across the benchmark run.

presets.label: Critical Miss Rate vs False Review Load
Balanced OTS vs False Review Load
